The '''Champion''' was a combat [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] employed by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Force]], during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Characteristics==
This model was armed with three-turreted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and could hold its own against enemy infantry and armor. It was succeeded by the [[Champion (vehicle)|Heavy Champion]]. The vehicle also could carry one extra [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|royal trooper]].

==History==
The Champions were used to defend [[Parrlay]], [[New Centrif]] and [[Vis/Legends|Vis]]
cities from [[OOM-9/Legends|OOM-9's]] invading forces. The Champions also saw action during the [[Capture of Harte Secur|capture]] of [[Harte Secur]] alongside [[Champion (vehicle)|Heavy Champions]] (the Champions' successors) to protect the Harte Secur's [[command center]] when OOM-9 invaded the city. Also, several Champions were used during the [[Invasion of Spinnaker]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Champion was a mech destroyer in the game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
